---
title: "Areal Data Models and Spatial Econometrics"
subtitle: "GEO-003 | Track B — Geospatial"
description: "Statistical models for data aggregated over regions: census tracts, counties, countries. Covers spatial autoregressive models, spatial regression, and the disease mapping models that bridge to epidemiology."
date: "2026-04-11"
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
number-sections: true
---

# Areal Data Models and Spatial Econometrics

*Content not yet generated.*

Run the generation pipeline and then `src/quarto_export.jl` to populate this page.
